summary: Frontend testing of new Paint Shop and Kitchen Builder modules plus dead link fixes. All features working after backend fix for TruckDesignCreate model.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Updated TruckDesign and TruckDesignCreate models to support Paint Shop v2 fields
test_credentials: No authentication required - all pages publicly accessible
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Paint Shop and Kitchen Builder features are working. Backend was updated to support new Paint Shop v2 fields (base_model, split_pattern, wrap_id, serving_window, awning, accessories, wheels).

Paint Shop.page_loads: PASS - Page loads with truck preview and all customization sections
Paint Shop.change_truck_model: PASS - Can select different truck models (Step Van Classic, Cargo Van, etc.) and see different truck shapes
Paint Shop.change_paint_color: PASS - Can select colors from different categories (Classic, Blues, Reds, etc.) and see updates
Paint Shop.finish_type_selection: PASS - Can select Gloss, Satin, Matte, Metallic, Pearl finishes
Paint Shop.two_tone_patterns: PASS - Can enable Horizontal Split, Diagonal Split, Hood & Roof, Racing Stripe patterns
Paint Shop.save_design: PASS - Save Design button works and shows 'Design saved!' toast

Kitchen Builder.page_loads: PASS - Page loads with floor plan and equipment catalog
Kitchen Builder.equipment_categories: PASS - All 7 categories present: Cooking, Refrigeration, Prep, Sinks, Ventilation, Beverage, Serving
Kitchen Builder.floor_plan_indicators: PASS - Serving window and door indicators visible on floor plan
Kitchen Builder.validation_issues: PASS - Shows '3 Issues' for missing required items (3-comp sink, hand sink, fire extinguisher)
Kitchen Builder.save_layout: PASS - Save Layout button works and shows 'Layout saved!' toast

Dashboard NEW badges.paint_shop_badge: PASS - NEW badge visible on Paint Shop card
Dashboard NEW badges.kitchen_builder_badge: PASS - NEW badge visible on Kitchen Builder card

Dead Links Fixed.crew_quarters_nav: PASS - Vault, Schedule, Team buttons show 'coming soon' toast
Dead Links Fixed.crew_quarters_footer: PASS - Privacy Policy, Support Center, System Status show 'coming soon' toast
Dead Links Fixed.payroll_sidebar: PASS - Staff Directory, Scheduling, Tip Management show 'coming soon' toast
Dead Links Fixed.payroll_nav: PASS - Inventory, Compliance show 'coming soon' toast

bug_fixed.issue: Paint Shop Save Design returning 422 error
bug_fixed.root_cause: TruckDesignCreate model in server.py expected texture_type field, but Paint Shop v2 sends different fields (base_model, split_pattern, wrap_id, etc.)
bug_fixed.fix: Updated TruckDesign and TruckDesignCreate models to make texture_type optional and add new optional fields for Paint Shop v2: base_model, split_pattern, wrap_id, serving_window, awning, accessories, wheels
